title: ravenia biramosa
intro: Ravenia biramosa, also known as the 'Biramosa', is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to New Guinea and nearby islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The Biramosa plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or the extraction of essential oils, which can be used to create medicinal preparations for topical or internal use.
